# daytona_sandbox_region_quota (Data Source)

Reads the Daytona region quota that applies to a sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_region_quota" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.

### Optional

- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `allowed_gpu_types` (List of String) Allowed GPU types.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `max_cpu_per_gpu_sandbox` (Number) Maximum CPU per GPU sandbox.
- `max_cpu_per_sandbox` (Number) Maximum CPU per sandbox.
- `max_disk_per_gpu_sandbox` (Number) Maximum disk per GPU sandbox.
- `max_disk_per_non_ephemeral_sandbox` (Number) Maximum disk per non-ephemeral sandbox.
- `max_disk_per_sandbox` (Number) Maximum disk per sandbox.
- `max_memory_per_gpu_sandbox` (Number) Maximum memory per GPU sandbox.
- `max_memory_per_sandbox` (Number) Maximum memory per sandbox.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID for the quota.
- `region_id` (String) Daytona region ID for the quota.
- `sandbox_class` (String) Sandbox class.
- `total_cpu_quota` (Number) Total CPU quota.
- `total_disk_quota` (Number) Total disk quota.
- `total_gpu_quota` (Number) Total GPU quota.
- `total_memory_quota` (Number) Total memory quota.
